tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall address
 edit "UBUNTU"
  set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
 next
 edit "C2HOST"
  set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
 next
end
config firewall policy
 edit 1
  set name "DENY-C2"
  set srcintf "port2"
  set dstintf "port1"
  set srcaddr "UBUNTU"
  set dstaddr "C2HOST"
  set action deny
  set schedule "always"
  set service "ALL"
  set logtraffic all
 next
 edit 2
  set name "ALLOW-WAN"
  set srcintf "port2"
  set dstintf "port1"
  set srcaddr "UBUNTU"
  set dstaddr "all"
  set action accept
  set schedule "always"
  set service "ALL"
  set nat enable
  set logtraffic all
 next
end
show firewall address
show firewall policy
